name: Sweet & Sour Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut an X in the root end of each onion, then blanch them in boiling water for 30 seconds.
2. Remove the skins and sauté the onions in olive oil for a few minutes.
3. Add enough water to cover the onions by about an inch, then cook until they soften slightly, around 10 minutes.
4. Stir in raisins, vinegar, brown sugar, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer slowly for approximately an hour until the onions are golden-brown and tender.
5. If excess liquid remains after an hour, reduce the heat slightly and continue cooking until the remaining liquid thickens into a syrupy consistency.
6. Optionally add a thyme branch or bay leaf to the onions while they finish cooking.
